value.body:
The desktop package has several repeated low-level parsing and persistence patterns that should be cleaned up before more chat/API work lands.

Areas found:
- Repeated SQLite row casts and JSON parsing helpers in `/Users/robertpitt/Projects/cycle/packages/desktop/src/main/DesktopAgentChatStore.ts` and `/Users/robertpitt/Projects/cycle/packages/desktop/src/main/agents/services/DesktopAgentSessionStore.ts`.
- Manual protocol guards and payload mappers in `/Users/robertpitt/Projects/cycle/packages/desktop/src/renderer/components/ChatPanel.tsx`.
- `cycleApiClient.ts` mixes API discovery, HTTP decoding, query/path building, ticket-draft WebSocket startup, and use-case routing in one large module: `/Users/robertpitt/Projects/cycle/packages/desktop/src/renderer/lib/cycleApiClient.ts`.

Acceptance criteria:
- Add small shared helpers for JSON decode/encode, record guards, and optional payload properties where they remove duplication.
- Replace repeated SQLite `as unknown as ReadonlyArray<...>` call sites with a focused typed row helper or explicit boundary decoder.
- Move ChatPanel protocol normalization into a testable renderer lib or schema-backed parser.
- Split `cycleApiClient` enough that request/response decoding, path/query helpers, and ticket-draft chat startup are separated without changing public behavior.
- Preserve existing storage formats and API behavior.
- Add or update targeted tests for invalid JSON/payload fallback behavior.
- `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop typecheck` passes.

Verification note from triage:
- `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop typecheck` passed.
- Full desktop tests were attempted; one API startup test failed because this sandbox blocks binding to `127.0.0.1` with `EPERM`, not because of the scanned code.

frontmatter.title: Consolidate desktop parsing and persistence hygiene

value.title: Consolidate desktop parsing and persistence hygiene
